title: Zelda CDi Link All Visible Dialogue (Vocals Isolated) (Blue Screen 1080p)
description:
Covers both Faces of Evil and Wand of Gamelon.  Omitted tutorial because that's not technically a cutscene, check MLPFun's starter pack if you need it:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1NQW0YhT_8

Vocals isolated using iZotope.
